explanation: I entered the seeded username for the local demo account.
I entered the shared seeded password for the example user.
I signed in so the authenticated transaction tools can load.
I opened the new transaction wizard from the top navigation.
I searched for Darrel Ortiz so the receiver list narrows to the intended person.
I selected Darrel Ortiz as the receiver for the payment.
I entered the seeded payment amount.
I entered a unique note so the new payment can be verified later in the feed.
I submitted the payment for Darrel Ortiz.
I returned from the transaction wizard to the main transaction feeds so I can verify the new payment.
I switched to the personal feed to verify that the newly created payment appears in the signed-in user's feed.

action.summary: I signed in, created a payment to Darrel Ortiz, returned to the transaction feeds, and verified the new payment in the personal feed.

explanation: The newly created payment is visible in the personal feed now, so I am ending the task.
